task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Employee Pulse 2025' survey has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a survey titled 'Employee Pulse 2025' in the survey list, dashboard, or title bar of the LimeSurvey interface.

task_completion.description: Verify that the '2024 Initiatives' question group has been removed from the new survey.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Check the survey structure or group list for 'Employee Pulse 2025'. The group '2024 Initiatives' should NOT be visible.

task_completion.description: Verify that the '2025 Strategic Focus' question group has been added.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a question group titled '2025 Strategic Focus' in the survey structure or group list of the 'Employee Pulse 2025' survey.

task_completion.description: Verify the addition of the 'AI_USAGE' question with correct type, text, and options.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a question with the code 'AI_USAGE' and text 'How frequently do you use Generative AI tools in your daily work?'. Verify that its type is 'List (Radio)' and that the answer options 'Daily', 'Weekly', 'Monthly', and 'Never' are configured.

task_completion.description: Verify the addition of the 'INNOVATION_IDEA' question with correct type and text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a question with the code 'INNOVATION_IDEA' and text 'Please share one idea for improving team efficiency this year.'. Verify that its type is set to 'Long free text'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Employee Pulse 2025' survey has been activated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an 'Active' status badge, a green checkmark/play icon, or a 'Stop this survey' / 'Deactivate' button associated with the 'Employee Pulse 2025' survey.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the LimeSurvey web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show a web browser navigating the LimeSurvey admin interface, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should be the genuine LimeSurvey application, not a text editor, HTML mockup, or manipulated DOM.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use a database client to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no screenshots of MySQL, phpMyAdmin, or terminal SQL queries being used to insert survey data.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task is performed in LimeSurvey. The target survey must be exactly titled 'Employee Pulse 2025'. The obsolete group to remove is '2024 Initiatives'. The new group is '2025 Strategic Focus'. Question 1 must have the code 'AI_USAGE' and type 'List (Radio)' (internal type 'L'). Question 2 must have the code 'INNOVATION_IDEA' and type 'Long free text' (internal type 'T').
